short_summary: Tren de Aragua strike, G7 protests
rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Poland's security, energy, or economy in a new qualitative way; the US strike on Tren de Aragua and G7 protests are distant background noise for a Polish resident. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike
top_events.summary: A US military strike eliminated the Tren de Aragua gang leader — distant event with no direct impact on Poland's security or daily life.
